response.step_by_step_log: 1. Scanned the entire video for audio content. 2. Identified Minecraft instrumental game sounds (farming, walking, chest interaction) and the streamer's spoken commentary. 3. Confirmed that no vocal music is present in any part of the video. 4. Generated the JSON response with the 'contains_vocal_music' flag set to false and all song-related metadata set to null.
response.global_summary: A video featuring Minecraft farming gameplay, including inventory management and organizing items into chests. The video is accompanied by conversational commentary from the VTuber, with no vocal music present throughout the duration.

scenes.description: The streamer manages a Minecraft farm, planting and harvesting crops, followed by organizing items in chests. Throughout the video, the streamer provides commentary on the gameplay, and only instrumental game music is audible.
